tasks.title: Stop defaulting missing parallel completion signals to Done
evidence: Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/merge_runner.rs:383-385,448-456 (ensure_completion_signal_in_workspace writes TaskStatus::Done when missing)
Repro: delete .ralph/cache/completions/<TASK_ID>.json in a merge workspace then run parallel merge; completion defaults to done even if worker failed
plan: Change ensure_completion_signal_in_workspace to return an error (or create a non-Done status) when the completion signal is missing.
Update merge runner call sites to surface the error and keep the PR/task blocked until a real completion signal exists.
Add tests covering missing completion signals in parallel merge flow.
Verify by running `cargo test -p ralph` and confirming the new tests pass.

tasks.title: Validate queue/done bytes before applying merge results
evidence: Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/mod.rs:890-923 (apply_merge_queue_sync writes queue/done bytes without parsing or validation)
Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/merge_runner.rs:286-338 (validation only occurs in conflict-resolution path)
Repro: merge a PR that writes invalid JSON into queue/done; apply_merge_queue_sync will persist invalid files to root
plan: Parse queue/done bytes in apply_merge_queue_sync using load_queue_with_repair_and_validate before writing to disk.
If validation fails, return an error and keep local queue/done untouched; include actionable error context.
Add tests to cover invalid queue bytes being rejected.
Verify by running `cargo test -p ralph` and confirming the validation tests pass.

tasks.title: Reject PR heads that do not match the parallel branch prefix
evidence: Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/merge_runner.rs:120-127 (task_id derived from PR head)
Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/merge_runner.rs:591-597 (task_id_from_branch returns full head when prefix mismatch)
Repro: PR head 'feature/RQ-0002' with branch_prefix 'ralph/' yields task_id 'feature/RQ-0002', creating invalid completion signal paths and failing queue lookup
plan: Change task_id_from_branch to return Result<String> and validate prefix match + task ID format (no path separators).
Propagate the error in handle_pr and record a clear warning in state for manual intervention.
Add unit tests for prefix mismatch and invalid task IDs.
Verify by running `cargo test -p ralph` and confirming the new tests pass.

tasks.title: Enforce clean-repo preflight for parallel run loop
evidence: Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/mod.rs:70-115 (run_loop_parallel lacks clean-repo enforcement)
Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/mod.rs:604-613 (run_one_impl enforces clean repo via require_clean_repo_ignoring_paths)
Repro: create uncommitted change outside allowed paths, then run `ralph run loop --parallel 2`; it proceeds without the clean-repo guard
plan: Add a preflight clean-repo check to run_loop_parallel using git::require_clean_repo_ignoring_paths with the same allowed paths as run_one_impl.
Honor --force to bypass the check, consistent with non-parallel behavior.
Add a unit/integration test that parallel run rejects dirty repos when --force is not set.
Verify by running `cargo test -p ralph` and confirming the new test passes.

tasks.title: Count open PRs toward parallel max_tasks on resume
evidence: Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/mod.rs:968-978 (initial_tasks_started ignores open PRs)
Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/worker.rs:83-87 (open PRs are excluded from selection, but not counted toward max_tasks)
Repro: create state with an open PR record, run with --max-tasks 1; a new task still starts
plan: Include open (unmerged) PR records in initial_tasks_started so max_tasks reflects work already completed in a previous parallel run.
Add a unit test that builds a state file with open PRs and asserts max_tasks prevents over-starting on resume.
Verify by running `cargo test -p ralph` and confirming the new test passes.

tasks.title: Avoid permanent blockers from finished_without_pr records
evidence: Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/mod.rs:851-887 (record_finished_without_pr writes a blocker entry on PR creation failure or auto_pr disabled)
Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/worker.rs:89-91 (finished_without_pr entries are always excluded from selection)
Repro: run parallel with auto_pr disabled; successful tasks are recorded as finished_without_pr and are blocked from rerun without manual state edits
plan: Define an expiration/rehydration policy for finished_without_pr records (e.g., TTL or allow rerun when reason is AutoPrDisabled/DraftPrDisabled).
Update collect_excluded_ids and state pruning to honor the policy.
Add tests covering both transient PR failures and auto_pr disabled scenarios.
Verify by running `cargo test -p ralph` and confirming the new tests pass.

tasks.title: Prune in-flight tasks with missing PID using a TTL
evidence: Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/mod.rs:927-954 (prune_stale_tasks_in_flight retains records when pid is None)
Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/state.rs:65-92 (tasks_in_flight stored in state file and used for exclusions)
Repro: create state.json with a tasks_in_flight entry that has pid=null and an existing workspace path; parallel run will never drop it and capacity stays blocked
plan: Extend ParallelTaskRecord with started_at (or last_seen) and persist it when spawning workers.
Update prune_stale_tasks_in_flight to drop pid-less records older than a safe TTL and log a warning.
Add tests for pid-missing records both within and beyond the TTL.
Verify by running `cargo test -p ralph` and confirming the new tests pass.

tasks.title: Add preflight queue/done validation in parallel loop
evidence: Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/mod.rs:70-115 (run_loop_parallel has no queue validation step before spawning workers)
Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/worker.rs:52-68 (select_next_task_locked loads queue but does not validate)
Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/mod.rs:460-475 (run_one_impl validates queue/done before execution)
Repro: introduce a schema-invalid queue.json then run `ralph run loop --parallel 2`; failures occur per-worker instead of failing fast
plan: Validate queue/done once at the start of run_loop_parallel (using load_queue_with_repair_and_validate).
Abort the parallel run with a clear error if validation fails.
Add a test that invalid queue.json fails early in parallel mode.
Verify by running `cargo test -p ralph` and confirming the new test passes.

tasks.title: Fail fast if gh CLI is missing when auto PR/merge is enabled
evidence: Path: crates/ralph/src/git/pr.rs:1-14 (module assumes gh is installed and authenticated)
Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/mod.rs:148-160 (merge runner starts without checking gh availability)
Repro: remove gh from PATH and run `ralph run loop --parallel 2`; tasks complete but PR creation fails and tasks end in finished_without_pr blockers
plan: Add a preflight check (gh --version and gh auth status) when auto_pr/auto_merge is enabled for parallel runs.
Fail early with a clear error if gh is unavailable or unauthenticated.
Add tests using the existing git test harness to simulate missing gh and assert a helpful error.
Verify by running `cargo test -p ralph` and confirming the new test passes.

tasks.title: Clean up merge-runner base-sync workspace after use
evidence: Path: crates/ralph/src/commands/run/parallel/merge_runner.rs:352-360 (apply_completion_and_collect_bytes creates workspace_root/.base-sync)
Command: rg -n base-sync -S crates/ralph/src -> merge_runner.rs:358,360,397,1029 (no cleanup site found)
Repro: run parallel merges repeatedly; .base-sync persists under workspace_root and accumulates state
plan: Decide whether base-sync should be reused or removed after each merge batch.
If cleanup is desired, add removal in merge_runner or cleanup_guard (after merge results are collected).
Add a test asserting base-sync cleanup behavior.
Verify by running `cargo test -p ralph` and confirming the new test passes.
